AVINYAA
BIO QUEST 26

"Unleashing the power of Biotech innovations"

9th & 10th April 2026
Organized by Centre for Biotechnology JNTUH University College of Engineering,
Science & Technology, Hyderabad
About

Who We Are

🧪 About the Symposium

AVINYAA is a symposium for Biotechnologists, Bioengineers, and allied discipline students. A platform to present research, showcase technical strength, and interact with peers for holistic development. AVINYAA bridges the gap between academic research and industry innovation.

🏛️ About the Institute

JNTUH University College of Engineering Science and Technology Hyderabad is known for academic excellence and NAAC A+ accreditation. Established under Govt. Act No. 30 of 2008, it has MOUs with national and international organizations, fostering knowledge, innovation, and quality education for over six decades.

🔬 Centre for Biotechnology

Established in 1989 at JNTUH, the Centre for Biotechnology focuses on research, teaching, and learning in biotechnology and allied areas. It offers B.Tech, M.Tech, M.Sc, and Ph.D programs to develop competent professionals. Faculty are recognized nationally and internationally with publications in reputed journals.

  • Legacy of excellence in research & education
  • Expert, internationally recognized faculty
  • Alumni placed globally in academia & industry
  • 21st century vision in healthcare, agriculture & AI-bio

📋 About AVINYAA

AVINYAA is a platform designed for the next generation of Biotechnologists and Bioengineers. Our mission is to bridge the gap between academic research and industry innovation. Join us at the Centre for Biotechnology, JNTUH UCESTH, for two days of intense competition, networking, and scientific discovery.

Events

Explore the Quest

Technical competitions, workshops, fun events and cultural activities — two days packed with discovery.

🔭

Aavishkar

Where Research Meets Innovation
📅 9th April 2026

Present your original research and scientific breakthroughs to a panel of experts through oral and poster presentations.

Oral Presentation Poster Presentation

Rules & Submission

  • Abstract not more than 350 words
  • Submit to: bioquest.cbtucesth@jntuh.ac.in
  • Abstract deadline: 30th March 2026
  • Acceptance notification: 2nd April 2026
🧬

Gene Quest (Saap Sidhi)

The Ultimate Genomic Journey
📅 10th April 2026

A biology-themed twist on classic Snakes and Ladders. Navigate through the helix, avoid mutations (snakes), and climb sequences (ladders) to reach the finish!

Fun EventBiology Game
🗺️

Escape the Lab

Crack the Code, Find the Treasure
📅 10th April 2026

Put your analytical skills to the test. Solve complex biological clues and race against time to uncover the hidden treasure within the campus.

Treasure HuntTeam Event
🎤

Debate

Where Logic Meets Biological Ethics
📅 2nd April 2026

A clash of perspectives on controversial and cutting-edge topics in modern biotechnology. Battle of wits, evidence, and rhetoric before the jury.

TechnicalEthics
💻

Bioinformatics Workshop

Mastering the Digital Blueprint of Life
📅 1st April 2026

A hands-on session focusing on computational tools, molecular docking, and drug discovery. Enhance your dry-lab skills with industry-standard software.

Hands-OnWorkshopComputational
🎨

Petri Art Workshop

Painting with the Colors of Life
📅 1st April 2026

Explore the beautiful intersection of Microbiology and Art. Use microbial cultures as your palette and petri dishes as canvas to create living masterpieces.

CreativeWorkshopMicrobiology
🔍

Bio Pictionary

The Ultimate Biological Identification
📅 6th April 2026

Think you know your organisms? Identify mystery biological images from rare microbes to complex cell structures and list their key characteristics.

Fun EventBiology Quiz
🏅

Power Play

Unleash the Athlete Within
📅 30th & 31st March 2026

Step out of the lab and onto the field! Showcase teamwork, strategy, and physical prowess in classic indoor and outdoor games.

Badminton Chess Carrom Cricket
Cultural Events
Two days of celebration beyond the lab
💃 Dancing 🎤 Singing ⚡ Flashmob 🎵 DJ Night

Mark your calendars. The quest begins now.

Mar

31
Mar

Badminton, Chess, Carrom, Cricket continue

1
Apr

2
Apr

6
Apr

Bio Pictionary

The Ultimate Biological Identification Challenge

9
Apr

Apr

Research

Thrust Areas

Bioinformatics & Computational Biology
💊
Medical & Pharmaceutical Biotechnology
🧬
Gene Therapy & Genetic Engineering
🤖
AI & ML in Biotechnology
🌿
Plant Tissue Culture & Genome Editing (CRISPR)
🦠
Microbial Biotechnology & Synthetic Biology
⚗️
Industrial Biotechnology & Bioprocess Engineering
🫀
Stem Cell Therapy & Regenerative Medicine
⚡
Biofuels & Renewable Energy Biotechnology
🌍
Environmental Biotechnology & Bioremediation
